message:
Improve extension protocol dispatch, manifest hashing, and I/O error propagation

Extension dispatcher (extension_dispatcher.rs):
- protocol_hostcall_op() returns Option<&str> instead of Option<String>
  to eliminate unnecessary allocation on every call
- New protocol_error_fallback_reason() maps error codes to static
  diagnostic strings; protocol_error_details() builds structured JSON
  diagnostics with dispatcher decision trace and schema diff
- dispatch_protocol_message() refactored: validation as preflight step
  with structured error outcomes for non-empty call_ids; borrows
  params instead of cloning upfront; dispatch_session_ref() takes
  &Value instead of owned

Extension inclusion (extension_inclusion.rs):
- canonicalize_json_value() recursively sorts JSON keys via BTreeMap
  for deterministic serialization regardless of insertion order
- normalize_manifest_value() strips generated_at for content-only
  comparison; normalized_manifest_hash() computes SHA-256 of canonical
  JSON for drift detection
- Tests verify hash stability across key reordering and timestamp
  changes, and sensitivity to actual content changes

Extensions (extensions.rs):
- required_capability_for_host_call_static() returns Option<&'static str>
  instead of Option<String>; original function delegates to static
  variant; internal callers switched to avoid allocation

Extensions JS (extensions_js.rs):
- Pipe reader threads in PiJsRuntime subprocess execution now return
  Result<Vec<u8>, String> instead of silently swallowing read errors

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
